config.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 24/05/2024
	Purpose:
			The purpose of the script to close panel and reset all the fields.
	"""	

	try:
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'WiGeneralPannel'   				
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'WIid':int(0),'name':'','desc':'','areaId':-1,'lineId':-1,'isActive':1}		 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("TruncateTempTable",payload = {}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
		self.view.custom.cntSelectedFixture=0
		self.view.custom.cntSelectedStep=0
	except: 
		#start of except block  
			screenName ='Work Instruction'   
			filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/WIGeneral')  
			errorFunction = str('Event:onClick  -> cntCancel/btnCancel')  
			errorType=str('Application')  
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		#End of except block

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 07/09/2024
		Purpose:
				Called to save record
		"""
	try:
		#values from the form
		#fixtureList=[]
		OPList=self.view.params.assignedop
		isValidate=1
		#try:
		areaId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
		lineId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value
		workstationId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value
		wiName=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntRefName").getChild("txtRefName").props.text
		description=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDesc").getChild("txtDesc").props.text
		isActive=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
		createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		headerLabel=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text
		wiID=int(self.view.custom.wiId)
		system.perspective.print(wiID)
		modelID=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value
		#curriculumCode=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCurriculumCode").getChild("drpCurriculumCode").props.value
		stepCount=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAddDetails").getChild("lblStepCount").props.text
		BomId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntBOM").getChild("drpBOM").props.value
		#Acccessing AuditLog Payload from custom param as payload1 and loggedInUserId
		payload1=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
		loggedInUserId=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		#End of values from the form
		Project_VECV.Configuration.WIGeneral.ButtonSave.SaveWorkInstruction(headerLabel,wiID,wiName,description,areaId,lineId,workstationId,isActive,createdBy,stepCount,modelID,OPList,BomId,payload1,loggedInUserId)
		
		
		
	except: 
		#start of except block  
			screenName ='Work Instruction'   
			filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/WIGeneral')  
			errorFunction = str('Event:onClick  -> cntAdd/btnSave')  
			errorType=str('Application')  
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber,payload1) 
		#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 24/05/2024
		Purpose:
				Called to update record
	"""

	# implement your handler here
	fixtureList=[]
	stepList=[]
	isValidate=1
	try:
		#start of try block  
		areaId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
		lineId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value
		workstationId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value
		wiName=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntRefName").getChild("txtRefName").props.text
		description=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDesc").getChild("txtDesc").props.text
		isActive=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
		createdBy=self.session.custom.currentUserId
		headerLabel=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text
		wiID=int(self.view.custom.wiId)
		curriculumCode=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCurriculumCode").getChild("drpCurriculumCode").props.value
		stepCount=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAddDetails").getChild("lblStepCount").props.text
		isReworkWI=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntRework").getChild("RadioGroup").props.value	
		
		params = {"Name":str(wiName),"Description":str(description),"AreaId":areaId,"LineId":int(lineId),"WorkStationId":workstationId,'IsReworkWI':isReworkWI,"IsActive":bool(isActive),"CurriculumCode":curriculumCode,"WIID":int(wiID),"CreatedBy":int(createdBy)}
		result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/WI/UpdateWI",params)	
		if(int(result) > 0):		
			message = "Record updated successfully."	
		else:
			message = "Can not inactive this work instruction. It is assigned to the product."
	
			
		if(str(result)>'0'):
			messageType = 'updatePop'   
			payload={'isVisible':0} 	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,payload,scope = 'page' )	
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			headerLabel = "Add"
			messageType = 'WiGeneralPannel'   				
			payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'WIid':int(0),'name':'','desc':'','areaId':-1,'lineId':-1,'WorkStationId':-1,'isActive':-1,'UsedFixtureCount':0,'UsedStepCount':0}		 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
			
			messageType = 'popup_View'     			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,payload = {"display":1,'text':str(message)},scope = 'page' )
			system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
			system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
			system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Work Instruction'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/WIGeneral')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:update-> cntAdd/btnSave')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

# implement your handler here
	load=payload.copy()
	system.perspective.print(payload)
	load.pop('headerLabel')
	load.pop('Action')

	import json
	load_json = json.dumps(load)
	self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload=load_json

onChange.script:
"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 04/09/2024
			Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9 _-]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 04/09/2024
			Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9 _-]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 24/05/2024
		Purpose:
				The purpose of the script to close panel and reset all the fields.
	"""		
	try:
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'WiGeneralPannel'   				
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'WIid':int(0),'name':'','desc':'','areaId':-1,'lineId':-1,'isActive':1}		 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("TruncateTempTable",payload = {}, scope = "page")
		self.view.custom.cntSelectedFixture=0
		self.view.custom.cntSelectedStep=0
	except: 
		#start of except block  
			screenName ='Work Instruction'   
			filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/WIGeneral')  
			errorFunction = str('Event:onClick  -> cntHeader/btnClose')  
			errorType=str('Application')  
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		#End of except block

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 24/05/2024
	Purpose:
			The purpose of the script to call popup to select OPCodes.
	"""	
	try:
			
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			messageType = 'open_pop_addedit'
			iWI=self.view.custom.wiId
			ModelId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value
			BOMId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntBOM").getChild("drpBOM").props.value
			assignedsteps=self.view.params.assignedop
			workStationId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value
			workStationDict=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.options
			#system.perspective.print("WI")
			workStation=''
					#system.perspective.print("WI")
			if(len(workStationDict)>0):	
				for rows in range(len(workStationDict)):
					value=int(workStationDict[rows]['value'])
					label = workStationDict[rows]['label']
					system.perspective.print(value)	
					if(workStationId==value):
						workStation=label
						break	
			wiName=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntRefName").getChild("txtRefName").props.text
			header=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text+'    | '+'     Workstation - '+workStation+' | WI name - '+wiName 	
			system.perspective.print(header)		
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,{'header':str(header),'IsVisible':int(1),'workStationId':int(workStationId),'wiId':int(iWI),'AsignedStepList':assignedsteps,'ModelId':ModelId,'BOMId':BOMId},scope = 'page' )
			#system.perspective.sendMessage("TruncateTempTable",payload = {}, scope = "page")
	except: 
			#start of except block  
				screenName ='Work Instruction'   
				filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/WIGeneral')  
				errorFunction = str('Event:onClick  -> cntAddDetails/btnAddDetails')  
				errorType=str('Application')  
				errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
				description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
				lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
				Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
			#End of except block

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 21/05/2024
		Purpose:
				Used to call message handler for assigning steps
	"""
	try:
		
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		messageType = 'addEditWorkInstruction'
		workStationId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value
		workStationDict=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.options
		system.perspective.print(workStationId)
		workStation=''
		iWI=self.view.custom.wiId
		#system.perspective.print("WI")
		if(len(workStationDict)>0):	
			for rows in range(len(workStationDict)):
				value=int(workStationDict[rows]['value'])
				label = workStationDict[rows]['label']
				system.perspective.print(value)	
				if(workStationId==value):
					workStation=label
					break	
		
		wiName=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntRefName").getChild("txtRefName").props.text
		header=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text+'    | '+'     Workstation - '+workStation+' | WI name - '+wiName 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,{'Header':str(header),'IsVisible':int(1),'workStationId':int(workStationId),'wiId':int(iWI)},scope = 'page' )
		system.perspective.sendMessage("TruncateTempTable",payload = {}, scope = "page")
	except: 
		#start of except block  
			screenName ='Work Instruction'   
			filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/WIGeneral')  
			errorFunction = str('Event:onClick  -> cntAddDetails/btnAddDetails')  
			errorType=str('Application')  
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
			description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		#End of except block

self.view.refreshBinding("params.assignedop")
#	workstationId=self.props.value
#	result=Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.WorkStation.IsAllowConfigToWorkstation(workstationId)
#	if(result==0):
#		message = "Can not create WI for this workstation,this is not a parent dual workstation."
#		messageType = 'popup_View'     			
#		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,payload = {"display":1,'text':str(message)},scope = 'page' )

messageHandlers.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 24/05/2024
	Purpose:
			This message handler written to get Lists from the popoUp.
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	wiid=self.view.custom.wiId
	params = {"WIID":int(wiid)}	
	result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/WorkInstructionConfiguration/GetWI_UsedStepCount",params)
	self.view.custom.cntSelectedStep=result

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 24/05/2024
	Purpose:
			This message handler written to get values pass from the selected table row
			and pass that value to respective control and properties on the WIGeneral Panel.
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text = payload['headerLabel']
	if self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text=='Edit':
		self.view.custom.wiId = payload['WIid']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value=payload['ModelID']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBOM").getChild("drpBOM").props.value=payload['BOMID']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value = payload['areaId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value = payload['lineId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value= payload['WorkStationId']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntRefName").getChild("txtRefName").props.text = payload['name']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntDesc").getChild("txtDesc").props.text = payload['desc']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value = payload['isActive']
		self.view.custom.cntSelectedStep=payload['UsedStepCount']
	else:
		self.view.custom.wiId = payload['WIid']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntModel").getChild("drpModel").props.value=-1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBOM").getChild("drpBOM").props.value=-1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value = -1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLine").getChild("drpLine").props.value = -1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntWorkStation").getChild("drpWorkStation").props.value= -1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntRefName").getChild("txtRefName").props.text =''
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntDesc").getChild("txtDesc").props.text =''
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value = 1
		self.view.custom.cntSelectedStep=0
